name: Mine Line
author: Poki
description: Mine Line is a mining game where you're tasked with exploring a treacherous underground world! Strap on your jetpack and dive deep into the earth to start digging. To mine efficiently, connect rocks and form lines to trigger massive combos, allowing you to collect tons of resources at once! The rocks you mine can be used to fuel your jetpack, or you can sell them to buy cool powerups. Can you form the ultimate rock combo and unearth the most valuable treasures in one go? How to play Mine Line? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Dash: hold Shift with WASD or the arrow keys Who created Mine Line? Mine Line is created by Shoom Games. Play their other games on Poki: War of Sticks ! How can I play Mine Line for free? You can play Mine Line for free on Poki. Can I play Mine Line on mobile devices and desktop? Mine Line can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
